category_sources: Official cliPSafe page describes cliPSafe as a command line interface to Password Safe databases.
source_facts.description says command-line interface to Password Safe.
display_name_sources: Official waxandwane page heading uses cliPSafe.
docs_sources: Official waxandwane cliPSafe page includes Description, Download, Usage, and Commands sections.
repo_sources: Official waxandwane cliPSafe page provides only a source tarball download and no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official cliPSafe page says it works with Password Safe version 3 databases and is written in Perl.
source_facts.description says command-line interface to Password Safe.
